EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is prohibited to perform a read and a write operation on the device "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is prohibited to perform a read operation on the device "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is prohibited to perform an operation on the device "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} is prohibited to perform a write operation on the device "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
